CustomField.formula: IF( AND( Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 91,Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 100), 1.4, IF( AND(Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 81,Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 90), 1.3, IF( AND(Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 71,Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 80), 1.2, IF( AND(Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 61,Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 70), 1.1, IF( AND(Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 51,Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 60), 1.0, IF( AND(Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 41,Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 50), 0.9, VALUE(TEXT(Agency1_Factor_FunctionEvaluationUnder40__c) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: 代理店1_係数_機能評価
